content: Next.js 16 (stable, released Oct 2025, currently 16.2.10 on npm as of July 2026) is the current major version, superseding 14. Key changes: Turbopack is now the default bundler (2-5x faster builds, 10x faster refresh); caching flipped from implicit/opt-out to explicit opt-in via 'use cache' directive and Cache Components (dynamic rendering is now the default, which favors this project's need for fresh stock data); middleware.ts renamed to proxy.ts (old name deprecated not removed); params/searchParams/cookies/headers now require await; next/image defaults changed (quality default 75, minimumCacheTTL 4h, remotePatterns required instead of domains). Node 20.9+ and React 19.2 required.
